sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# First restore S to original (grow by 9)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 27}], intent='solve')

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After sky blue right:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['O', 'S', 'Y', 'N'] and n['pixels'] > 7:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'r' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"  red dot at ({b[0][0]}, {b[0][1]})")

print("\nlast_action_result:", last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
